The [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] '''''Xerxes''''' served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] Navy at the [[Battle of Mylok IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], destroyed Frigate ''Xerxes'' as Rebel leaders attempted to receive new hyperdrive technology from dissident [[Nharwaak]] researchers. Following the destruction of the ''Xerxes'', Imperial forces routed the Nharwaak, who had betrayed their former comrades, the [[Habeen]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
